declarations.description: Form-associated multiline text input web component with label, helper message, validation, auto-height growth, adornment slots, CSS parts, and CSS variable customization.
declarations.name: JBTextareaWebComponent

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial textarea value from markup. Prefer the value property for programmatic updates.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label text and accessible aria label.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Helper text shown below the textarea when no validation error is visible.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder forwarded to the inner textarea.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: External validation error message. When the attribute changes, the component updates its validation UI.

members.name: value
members.description: Canonical textarea value submitted with forms.

members.name: autoHeight
members.description: When true, grows the inner textarea height to fit content within CSS min/max height boundaries.

members.name: validation
members.description: jb-validation helper. Set validation.list for custom validation rules.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the inner textarea and sets the disabled custom state.

members.name: isDirty
members.description: True when current value differs from initialValue.

members.name: validationMessage
members.description: Current native validation message from ElementInternals.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Runs validation without showing the error message and returns whether the textarea is valid.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Runs validation, shows the first error message, and returns whether the textarea is valid.

events.name: change
events.description: Cancelable event fired when the user commits the textarea value.

events.name: input
events.description: Fired on each user input after value is updated.

events.name: beforeinput
events.description: Cancelable event fired before the inner textarea changes.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Cancelable keyboard event re-dispatched from the inner textarea.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Cancelable keyboard event re-dispatched from the inner textarea.

events.name: keypress
events.description: Cancelable keyboard event re-dispatched from the inner textarea.

events.name: enter
events.description: Cancelable keyboard event fired from keypress when Enter is pressed.

events.name: invalid
events.description: Dispatched when checkValidity or reportValidity finds an invalid value.

slots.name: block-start-section
slots.description: Block content above the textarea inside the textarea box.

slots.name: block-end-section
slots.description: Block content below the textarea inside the textarea box.

cssParts.name: textarea-box
cssParts.description: The wrapper around textarea and slot sections.

cssParts.name: message
cssParts.description: The helper or validation message element.

cssProperties.name: --jb-textarea-min-height
cssProperties.description: Minimum textarea height used by autoHeight.

cssProperties.name: --jb-textarea-max-height
cssProperties.description: Maximum textarea height used by autoHeight.
